chunk_map.heading: The verifier decides pass without you
Hooks for must-happen, prompts for taste

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Referent resolution under a sequential deck read.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Current body has no unresolved "the pieces"/"the three things" forward tease before naming (chunk 1's lede is now "First the shape, then the names", not a forward pointer at unnamed content). "Phase 3"/"Phase 4" and "the verifier you just wrote" (chunks 1, 2, 4, 6, 9) resolve under the session-artifact / module-arc-closer carve-out — this file is confirmed the M5 closing lecture delivered "In-room close after Debrief" for the same run whose phases are named.
No M5/M6 or other cross-file positional pointers remain above the maintainer fence (confirmed by grep and by the maintainer's own §3 disposition note).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Every backward reference points at a beat that exists.
rules_evaluated.evidence: chunk 1 ("The diagnose-and-re-send you just ran"), chunk 2 ("the reference you assembled at Phase 4"), chunk 4 ("You picked one at Phase 3"), chunk 9 ("your verifier from Phase 3") all resolve against this module's own just-completed exercise run per the Lecture meta placement (closing lecture, in-room close after Debrief).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Live-demo beats survive a text read.

rules_evaluated.evidence: Chunk 3 is thin (one bullet + one recap line) but the bullet carries a self-standing definition (external verifier, against plausible-but-wrong) — not a wait-state-only slide.

The "X, against Y" triad (chunk 2: reference/goal drift, plan.md/context rot; chunk 3: verifier/plausible-but-wrong) spans chunks with each leg carrying distinct concrete content — not a banned same-slide triple. No self-grading superlatives, no number-with-retraction, no abstraction-noun stacks, no empty-leg verb triplets found.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Internal dialect never lands on a slide.
rules_evaluated.evidence: No repo/maintainer dialect (compendium, forcing function, beat, mood, surface-as-noun) found in the body.
